---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature and how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Integration Points
Which Heli.OS services does this touch?
- [ ] Console (frontend)
- [ ] Fabric (data layer)
- [ ] Fusion (perception)
- [ ] Intelligence (AI/reasoning)
- [ ] Tasking (mission planning)
- [ ] Inference (ML models)
- [ ] SDK
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context
Any mockups, diagrams, or references.
